title: 特訓！ライバルだからッ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I'm headed to the mall to do some shopping,
suddenly...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoooa yeah! Time to traaain!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Walk fast! Don't crash into anyone! Go, go... Go,
go, go!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Pheeew! Nailed it!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What the heck are you doing?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Taishin! I'm just doing some
walking-quickly-through-crowds training!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I saw Hayahide doing this the other day. She looked super serious. I bet it's the secret to her power!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Uh... There's no way that's right. You're going to
get yourself hurt.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Aww, thanks for worrying about me! But I'm fine!
I'll totally pull it off. Just you watch!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'll go even faster this time! Go, go... GO,
GO—GAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: CRASHHH!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oof! That wall came outta nowhere!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Are you okay?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ughhh! It hurts, but I'm fine! No matter how many
times I fall, I'll get right back up!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hm? What could you two possibly be doing?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ohh! Hayahide! I'm trying that training you were
doing the other day!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You know, the dashing-through-crowds routine! I
can't believe you were using stores to train! SO
cool!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The other day? Oh, that had nothing to do with
training.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I... well... I was in a hurry to read the
academic journal I'd bought.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whaaaat?! You mean you just wanted to get
home faster?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
...Wait, does this mean that time I saw Taishin
hopping across the white lines on the crosswalk,
she was just... No way...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! When did you see that? Wait, why would
you think that had anything to do with training?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Gimme a BREAK! I was gonna do that next!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm your greatest rival! So I've gotta get waaay
stronger!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: That's your idea of rivalry? ...Oh dear.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Should rivals really need to use such roundabout
methods to compete effectively?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Running is enough.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Running! Oh yeeeaaah! That's it!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You're right. We just gotta run! Full speed ahead,
like always!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: What are we waiting for?! LET'S GOOO!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Excuse me?! I didn't mean right now!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
How unruly... Though, we'll be left behind at this
rate. I guess we have no choice but to compete.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh. Sigh. Fiiiiine.
